message:
fix(frame): remove dead branches in pct_change and rolling_count

Two simplifications that eliminate unreachable or no-op conditional branches:

1. pct_change: Remove the prev==0.0 special case that returned NaN. Division
   by zero in f64 naturally produces Inf/-Inf which matches pandas behavior
   for percentage change calculations. The special case was masking the
   mathematically correct result.

2. rolling_count: Remove the if/else branch on window fullness that executed
   identical code in both arms. The count is emitted regardless of whether
   the window is full, which is correct pandas rolling count semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
